name: luke
description: Luke's design DNA — the reference instance of the design-dna format.

vibes.name: Analog
vibes.description: Warm-paper editorial. Swiss grid, hairline rules, optical serifs, oldstyle figures, barely-there grain. Flat and print-like; motion is punctuation.

vibes.name: Fluent
vibes.description: Microsoft Fluent 2 re-tuned off the corporate default: every neutral warmed toward paper, brand swapped to left-bank blue, paired key+ambient shadows, 8px surfaces.

vibes.name: Geometric Orange
vibes.description: The GEX-RAY identity: instrument-panel near-black, one amber used with conviction, geometric display type over uppercase mono labels, square corners, scanline + noise texture.

vibes.name: Pressroom
vibes.description: Editorial letterpress: newsprint cream, real ink, one vermilion, serif throughout, double masthead rules, an offset-plate button that physically presses.
